meta.title: MagTexco - Tunisian Clothing Manufacturer
meta.description: MagTexco is a leading clothing manufacturer in Tunisia, offering high-quality garments and sustainable production for fashion brands worldwide.
meta.keywords: clothing tunisia, apparel industry tunisia, clothing manufacturer tunisia, garment supplier tunisia, sustainable fashion, magtexco

features.title: Uncompromising Quality
features.description: As a top apparel manufacturer in Tunisia, we meticulously source the finest materials and employ rigorous quality control at every stage of production.

features.title: Innovative Designs
features.description: Our team of expert designers stays ahead of trends, offering fresh and unique clothing designs and finishes for the global fashion market.

features.title: Sustainable Practices
features.description: Committed to eco-friendly manufacturing, we are a sustainable choice in the Tunisian apparel industry, minimizing waste and utilizing sustainable resources.

features.title: Reliable Partnership
features.description: We pride ourselves on transparent communication, timely delivery, and building lasting relationships with our clients in the apparel industry.

sustainability.title: Responsible Sourcing & Production
sustainability.subtitle: Our commitment to excellence extends beyond quality—we prioritize ethical practices and sustainability

features.title: Organic Materials
features.description: We source certified organic cotton and other sustainable materials from ethical suppliers.

features.title: Zero Waste
features.description: Our production process is designed to minimize waste and maximize efficiency

features.title: Ethical Production
features.description: Fair wages, safe working conditions, and respect for human rights

features.title: Certified Excellence
features.description: GOTS, OEKO-TEX, and Fair Trade certified manufacturing

about.title: Tradition Meets Innovation
about.image_alt: A skilled artisan working on a sewing machine in our Tunisian factory, showcasing our craftsmanship in clothing manufacturing
about.paragraph1: For over three decades, we've been at the forefront of clothing manufacturing, combining time-honored craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology.
about.paragraph2: Our journey began with a simple vision: to create garments that inspire designers and delight end consumers. Today, we partner with leading fashion brands worldwide, delivering premium clothing that set new standards in quality and innovation.
about.paragraph3: Every garment we create carries our commitment to excellence. From the selection of materials to the final quality check, we ensure that each piece meets our exacting standards.

stats.experience: Many years of experience in China, recently expanded to Tunisia

about_factory.title: 🏭 About Our Factory
about_factory.intro: Our production process is divided into two main stages: Collection Phase and Production Phase, each carefully managed to ensure quality and precision.
about_factory.certifications: Our factory is proud to be certified with ISO 9001, ISO 14001, GOTS, and GRS, reflecting our commitment to quality, environmental responsibility, and sustainable production.

collection_phase.phase1: PHASE 1 — Receipt of the technical file and creation of the pattern.
collection_phase.phase2: PHASE 2 — Sourcing of fabrics and accessories, prototype making.
collection_phase.phase3: PHASE 3 — Technical adjustments and repetitions (SMS) before production.

production_phase.phase1: PHASE 1 — Technical preparation and seeded players (TDS).
production_phase.phase2: PHASE 2 — Cutting, sewing, washing and finishing.
production_phase.phase3: PHASE 3 — Export and delivery of finished products.
